# ISA Spa

> India's luxury day spa brand with 50+ outlets. Signature massage therapies,
> facials, foot spa & pedicure, skin and body polishing treatments. Franchise
> and hotel-partnership opportunities available.

## Key pages
- [Services](/services): therapy menu, durations and pricing
- [Spa Locator](/spa-locator): all outlets by city with address and phone
- [Franchise](/franchise): franchise model and enquiry
- [Hotel Partnership](/hotel-partnership): turnkey spa for hotels
- [Membership](/isa-spa-membership): membership plans
- [Blog](/blog): wellness articles
- [Contact](/contact-us): get in touch

## Contact
Book an appointment: /appointment
